methods.name: calendar_get

methods.description: Delete a calendar by ID. Returns true if successful.

params.description: ID of calendar to delete

methods.name: calendar_exist

methods.description: Check if a calendar exists by ID. Returns true or false.

params.description: ID of calendar to check

methods.name: calendar_list
methods.description: List all calendars. Returns an array of calendar objects.
